creator: ziaee@FreeBSD.org
text:
Boot(8) and uefi(8) are known to need TLC, like tuning(7).

They have been in my manpage drafts since August, but rewriting them is quite serious. It has to be hollistic. I'm still studying in order to rewrite these pages correctly.

In the meantime, I would love to consider any  specific suggestions and share credit in the commit msg.
